raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased a perfume in online order on XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX : XXXX and XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX from XXXX, I got the package delivered from XXXX on XXXX XXXX however, it was a diffferent perfume which was delivered from the seller. I contacted XXXX immediately, and they asked me to return the package in store post which they will refund the money, I went to the XXXX store next day to return the perfume I received and store agent refused to take the perfume as the perfume did not match the product I ordered. Which is exactly the reason I wanted to return the perfume in the first place. I contacted XXXX support on call again and they mentioned they have issued a refund and same will show up in 10 business day to my account and Ill receive an email too. I contacted American Express as well to make them aware about this transaction I had made and made them aware of the dispute. They also started an enquiry with XXXX. However, after 10 days I didnt receive anything from XXXX and American Express also reached out to me and mentioned they contacted XXXX but XXXX mentioned I never worked with them so American Express can not refund my disputed amount and they charged me.. I again provided all proofs of my conversation with chat support, emails with XXXX to American Express again. American Express told me that I need to return perfume to XXXX and theyll refund me the money. I went to XXXX store again and they refused to take the product again as it did not match the description! I contacted American Express and XXXX and mentioned same thing to them again. However, American Express mentioned they will not be able to help me and I should work directly with XXXX. While XXXX support keeps telling me to go to store and return the perfume I received and their store customer service keeps refusing to accept the perfume stating the description does not match with what was ordered. 


XXXX case number : XXXX Amex dispute : XXXX
